overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai character traversing a coastal cliffside at dusk. The character runs through pine forests, descends a narrow rocky ravine, and emerges onto open coastal grasslands with a large traditional sailing ship visible offshore and distant mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested coastal cliff path with stone lanterns

agents.ego_description: samurai character running steadily along a winding dirt path through tall pine trees toward the ocean overlook

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the coastal path
calm sea visible through the trees in the distance
traditional Japanese stone lantern structure beside the path
large traditional wooden sailing ship with red sails visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a forested coastal trail at dusk, with the camera following a samurai character running between tall pine trees. Traditional stone lanterns mark the path as the ocean becomes visible through the trees ahead, with a large sailing ship anchored in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky ravine descending to shoreline

events.description: path enters narrow passage between tall rock walls, leaving the forest behind
emerging from shadowed ravine into brighter open coastal area with clearer view of the ship

agents.ego_description: character runs downhill through the narrow rocky passage, descending toward the shoreline with the ocean visible ahead

entered.detail: tall gray rock cliff face forming the left wall of the narrow passage
tall gray rock cliff face forming the right wall of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a narrow rocky ravine with steep cliff walls on both sides, creating a sheltered, shadowed environment. The path winds downward toward the shore, and the sailing ship becomes more prominent as the character emerges from the rocks into the open coastal area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal grassland with ocean view and distant mountains

events.description: exiting rocky passage onto open coastal grassland with expansive ocean views
distant snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon as the character rounds the coastline

agents.ego_description: character continues running along the coastal path through tall dry grass with the ocean and sailing ship visible to the left

entered.detail: tall golden-brown grass covering the coastal hillside
snow-capped mountain range visible on the distant horizon
dense pine forest lining the right side of the coastal path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the rocky ravine onto an expansive coastal grassland with the ocean stretching to the horizon. The large sailing ship remains visible offshore to the left while distant snow-capped mountains appear ahead. The path continues through tall dry grass with a pine forest edge on the right, maintaining the cool dusk lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pine forest through a narrow ravine and out onto an expansive coastal grassland at dusk. It begins on a forested trail, following a samurai running past traditional stone lanterns as the ocean and a distant sailing ship first peek through the tall trees. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow rocky ravine where steep cliff walls create a shadowed, enclosed environment that winds downward toward the shore. The camera then emerges from the rocks into a wide-open landscape, where the sailing ship becomes more prominent against the horizon. Finally, the view expands across tall dry grass and a distant range of snow-capped mountains, maintaining a cool dusk light as the path continues along the edge of a pine forest.
